description_long: This object depicts a fantastical flower figure with a humanoid form, featuring a head adorned with elongated, spiky petals in shades of tan and green, resembling a headdress. The upper body is covered in dense, straw-like textures, while the lower portion transitions into a dark, rocky base with small green foliage and purple accents, suggesting moss or tiny blossoms. The petals radiate outward in a dramatic, almost crown-like arrangement, giving the figure a regal and organic appearance. The overall structure is asymmetrical, with the petal 'headdress' sweeping back and to the side, and the body blending into the earthy base. The surface appears rough and fibrous, with a matte finish and visible textural variation. This flower object would stand out as a striking, nature-inspired sculpture in an urban park or garden setting.
description: A striking, humanoid flower figure with spiky tan and green petals, a straw-textured body, and a rocky, mossy base.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the dense, spiky petal arrangement and the humanoid upper body blending into the earthy base.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the sweeping, elongated petals and the transition from the straw-like torso to the rocky base.
description_view_2: The rear view showcases the dramatic petal headdress and the full extent of the mossy, textured base.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the curvature of the petals and the layered, fibrous textures along the body and base.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, crown-like configuration, radiating outward from the head in overlapping, spiky layers with some asymmetry and irregular spacing.
